name: chr20_20q13_2_ZNF217_SD
description: 20q13.2 SD region around ZNF217 (transcription factor / breast cancer oncogene), CYP24A1 and BCAS1. Classical 20q13.2 amplicon target in breast cancer; flanked by ~30-80 kb SDs that mark recurrent amplification breakpoints.

architecture.internal_structure: Direct SDs of 30-80 kb at 95-98% identity flanking ZNF217, BCAS1, CYP24A1; somatic amplification in ~20% of breast cancers; SD-mediated BFB-like amplicon structures.
